title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 26 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 26 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 26 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/07/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked and keep upward all the day.The main contract closed at 748.5,increased of 5.57%. Traders are moremotivated to ship, Speculative demand increases. Steel mills are mainly on the sidelines, and market turnover continues to pick up.PBF at Shandong port dealt 745 yuan/mt;increase 23-33 yuan/mt than yesterday.
